Song: Yaendi Yaendi
Singer: Vijay & Shruthi Haasaan
Movie: Puli

Vaanavil vattamaagudhae
vaaname kitta varudhae.
megangal mannil irangi
thogaikku aadai kattudhe.

iravellam veyilaagi poga
pagalellaam iravaagi poga
paruvangal vesam podudhae.

adi yendi yendi
enna vaattura...
adi yaendi yaendi
kannaal theettura

adi yaendi yendi
nenja killura
adi yaendi kadhal
kadalil thallura.

katti katti thanga katti
kattikolla konjam vaadi
kattikolla kotti kodu
natchathiram oru kodi.

pullimaan pudipattu pochu
puli kaiyyil adipattu pochu
vidupattu engae povadhu ?

adi yendi yendi
enna vaattura...
adi yaendi yaendi
kannaal theettura

adi yaendi yendi
nenja killura
adi yaendi kadhal
kadalil thallura.

hmmm
pinju mozhi solla solla
peachukulae thodi raagam

adi yendi yendi
enna vaattura...

kannaal theettura

adi yaendi yendi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaendi Yaendi'?

The song 'Yaendi Yaendi' expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of youthful exuberance.

What is the context of this song in the movie Puli?

In Puli, this song highlights the playful and romantic moments between the lead characters, adding to the film's vibrant atmosphere.

Who are the singers of 'Yaendi Yaendi'?

The song features the talented voices of Vijay and Shruti Haasan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yaendi Yaendi' was composed by Devi Sri Prasad, known for his catchy and energetic compositions.

When was 'Yaendi Yaendi' released?

'Yaendi Yaendi' was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yaendi Yaendi', the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the playful romance depicted in Puli. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it an ideal track for festive occasions. The collaboration between Vijay and Shruti Haasan brings a unique charm, enhancing the overall appeal of the song. This track not only entertains but also captures the essence of youthful love and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaendi Yaendi from Puli is a vibrant collaboration that showcases the dynamic vocals of Vijay and Shruti Haasan. With Devi Sri Prasad's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the energy and excitement that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: The sky is like a circle, and it comes close to the earth. The clouds are coming down to cover the ground.
All night long, it feels like day, and all day long, it feels like night; the seasons are changing.
What is this, oh why, what is happening... oh why, why does it feel wrong when I look?
Oh why, why does my heart ache? Oh why, why does love push me away?
Tie it up, tie it up, hold it tight; just a little, hold it tight, give me a star, a treasure.
Oh beautiful one, come and sit on my lap.
The tiger has caught the deer, and the tiger is in my hands; where will it escape?
What is this, oh why, what is happening... oh why, why does it feel wrong when I look?
Oh why, why does my heart ache? Oh why, why does love push me away?
Hmm, softly speak, speak, and let the melody flow.
With a kiss, the fragrance of the rose fills the air.
Before the honey flows, come, oh beautiful girl.
If you tie it up and hold it tight, where will it go after being tied?
What is this, oh why, what is happening... oh why, why does it feel wrong when I look?
Oh why, why does my heart ache? Oh why, why does love push me away?
